selection_rationale: Replace this text with the evidence-based reason for selecting typed EAV.

rejection_rationales.jsonb: Replace this text with the measured and operational reason JSONB was not selected.
rejection_rationales.hot_projection: Replace this text with the measured and operational reason hot projection was not selected.

operational_tradeoffs: Document index management, schema evolution, relation growth, WAL, VACUUM and observability implications.
migration_strategy: Document table creation, backfill, parity verification and persistence-port cutover.
rollback_strategy: Document how the previous persistence path remains recoverable until cutover verification completes.
